objects.description: Large central circle as logo mark, gold color
Brand name text 'BRAND' below the logo mark

choreography.description: Logo mark appears with dramatic grow-from-center (scale 0 to 1 with overshoot via bounce-in). Add a golden glow effect that intensifies as it appears.
Brand name text slides in from bottom with fade-in. Then tagline fades in below it 0.5s later. Logo mark does a subtle pulse (scale 1→1.05→1) once.
Everything holds in final position. Subtle glow pulsing on the logo mark for premium feel. Hold until end.
